projects.title: ShopEasy E-Commerce Platform
projects.description: A full-stack e-commerce web app with product listing, cart, user authentication, and Stripe payment integration. Built for a local retail business.

projects.title: TaskFlow Project Manager
projects.description: A Kanban-style project management tool with drag-and-drop boards, team collaboration features, and real-time notifications.

projects.title: FitTrack Mobile App
projects.description: A React Native fitness tracking application with workout logging, progress charts, custom meal planner, and BMI calculator.

projects.title: Bank Dashboard UI Kit
projects.description: A comprehensive Figma design system and UI kit for banking applications, including 60+ components with accessibility compliance.

projects.title: Weather Forecast PWA
projects.description: A progressive web application that fetches real-time weather data from OpenWeatherMap API with offline capability and push notifications.

projects.title: EventHub Event App
projects.description: A cross-platform mobile app for discovering local events, booking tickets, and connecting with event organizers.
